subject: English
chapter: The Beam of Light That Lit the Path for Women in Indian Science

activities_projects.title: Understanding Women in Science
activities_projects.objective: Develop awareness about the contributions of women in scientific fields
steps: Read the introduction of the chapter carefully
Discuss in groups the importance of women scientists in society
Write two key points about why representation in science matters
Share your thoughts with the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students recognise the importance of gender equality in science
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of participation and written points (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Biography Analysis of Bibha Chowdhuri
activities_projects.objective: Understand the life journey and achievements of Bibha Chowdhuri
steps: Read the chapter carefully
Identify important milestones in Bibha Chowdhuri’s life
Write a brief paragraph explaining her contribution to science
Discuss how her work influenced Indian scientific research
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn how perseverance and education contribute to success
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity of explanation and accuracy (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Timeline of Achievements
activities_projects.objective: Organise information from the chapter chronologically
steps: Identify important dates and events from Bibha Chowdhuri’s life
Arrange them in chronological order
Create a visual timeline on chart paper
Present the timeline to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve analytical and organisational skills

activities_projects.title: Identifying Character Traits
activities_projects.objective: Recognise qualities that helped Bibha Chowdhuri succeed in science
steps: Read the text again and highlight key personality traits
List traits such as determination, curiosity, and dedication
Provide examples from the chapter supporting each trait
Share your findings with the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand personal qualities necessary for scientific success

activities_projects.title: Group Discussion on Gender Barriers
activities_projects.objective: Encourage critical thinking about challenges faced by women in science
steps: Form small groups
Discuss possible difficulties women scientists faced in earlier times
Suggest ways society can support women in STEM careers
Present group ideas to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop awareness of social issues in education and careers
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of ideas and teamwork (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Scientific Vocabulary Activity
activities_projects.objective: Enhance understanding of academic and scientific terms
steps: Identify difficult or new words from the chapter
Find their meanings using a dictionary
Write each word in a sentence related to science
Share examples with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve vocabulary and contextual language usage

activities_projects.title: Research on Women Scientists
steps: Choose another woman scientist from India or the world
Research her discoveries and achievements
Write a short report summarising the findings
Present the report to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students gain knowledge about diverse scientific contributors

activities_projects.title: Poster Creation on Scientific Inspiration
activities_projects.objective: Encourage creativity while learning about scientists
steps: Create a poster highlighting Bibha Chowdhuri’s achievements
Include important facts and inspiring quotes
Decorate the poster with drawings or images
Display the poster in the classroom
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students express creativity and appreciation for scientific contributions

activities_projects.title: Short Speech Presentation
steps: Prepare a one-minute speech about Bibha Chowdhuri
Explain why her work is important for Indian science
Practice speaking clearly and confidently
Present the speech in front of the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop confidence and public speaking skills

activities_projects.title: Reflective Essay Writing
activities_projects.objective: Encourage critical thinking and personal reflection
steps: Reflect on the challenges faced by women in science
Write an essay on how Bibha Chowdhuri inspires future scientists
Include examples from the chapter
Submit the essay for evaluation
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students strengthen analytical writing and reflection skills
